rationale: Segmentation fault on connection; low-level memory crash, no specific spec rule contradicted.
secondaryPreferred spec requires excluding primary when secondaries available; driver incorrectly includes primary.
PHP-specific logging state not reset between requests; internal implementation bug, no spec rule.
Driver spams removed RS member with connections; implementation/reconnect bug, no named spec rule violated.
API ergonomics: undeprecate slaveOkay methods while no alternative exists; no spec conformance issue.
PHP-specific type coercion bug in MongoCursor constructor; language-binding issue, no spec rule.
INI config values ignored in PHP extension; internal configuration bug, no spec involvement.
Exception thrown with error code 0; API ergonomics/error reporting, no spec rule.
Documentation improvement about insert return value; doc update only.
Documentation about PHP _id passing technique; doc improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Double-free/memory corruption in GridFS test; internal memory management bug, no spec rule.
getReadPreference returns numeric types instead of string constants; PHP API inconsistency, not a spec-defined return format.
SDAM spec requires reading 'secondary' boolean field; driver defaults non-primary/non-arbiter nodes to secondary status.
MongoCursor::slaveOkay() broken after connection refactor; regression/API bug, spec doesn't define this legacy API.
API enhancement to add host/port/type to cursor info; no spec requirement for cursor info content.
Missing MongoCursor::setReadPreference() method; new feature addition, driver was not doing anything spec-incorrect.
Stale socket exception after server restart; connection recovery implementation bug, no specific spec rule.
aggregate() API breaks on single pipeline operator; PHP API usability bug, not a spec conformance issue.
BSON spec defines dates as int64 ms since epoch; negative timestamps (pre-epoch) corrupted during serialization.
Segfault when chunk count exceeds expected; memory management bug in GridFS, no spec rule.
GridFS memory leaks in temp variable cleanup; internal resource management, no spec rule.
BSON date deserialization off-by-one for pre-epoch dates (e.g. 1900-01-01); spec requires exact int64 ms round-trip.
Empty exception thrown when connection string has special chars in password; connection string parsing bug but no spec rule cited.
Performance problem with sparse index queries; query performance issue, no spec conformance violation.
Auth fails when slaveOk enabled on replica set; implementation interaction bug, cannot name specific violated spec rule.
Driver allocates memory per BSON size without validation on corrupt data; safety improvement, not a spec rule.
Read preference setReadPreference(RP_SECONDARY) broken with mongos sharded replicaSet; server selection spec violated.
Test cases for PHP-511 failing with wrong counts; CI/test failure, not a spec conformance issue.
Extreme performance degradation reported by user; performance issue, no spec rule involved.
Improvement to follow RS status changes faster; SDAM polling tuning, not a correctness spec violation.
Segfault on OS X after upgrade; memory/crash bug, no spec rule.
Exception when w>2 on replica set insert; unclear if spec rule violated vs. server error handling; insufficient detail.
Driver fails to detect new PRIMARY after failover; SDAM topology refresh implementation bug, no named spec rule.
batchSize+sort returns only batchSize records; cursor implementation bug, cannot name specific spec rule violated.
GridFS reports w=0 when it should report w=1; write concern spec requires correct acknowledgment level propagation.
Tests failing on mongod 2.3; CI/test infrastructure issue against new server version.
MongoGridFS::put not returning MongoId; GridFS API return value bug, no spec-defined return value for this method.
Memory leak in MongoGridFSFile::write(); internal resource management bug, no spec rule.
GridFS storeFile with string path fails for 2GB files; integer overflow/implementation bug, no spec rule.
Deprecated 'safe' option overwrites explicitly set collection-level w value; write concern spec requires option precedence.
GridFS does GLE on every chunk instead of last only; performance optimization, no spec rule on GLE frequency.
Redundant MongoGridFSCursor::key() implementation removal; internal refactor, no behavior or spec change.
MongoCursor::timeout() has no effect; legacy cursor timeout API bug, cannot identify specific spec rule violated.
Reconnect uses replication timeout instead of user connection timeout; implementation bug, no specific spec rule.
Connection timeout parameter not honored during connect; implementation bug, no specific spec rule named.
Spec defines connectTimeoutMS as the parameter name; driver uses non-spec name 'timeout' instead.
wtimeout incorrectly defaults to socket timeout value; write concern spec says wtimeout should not default for w=N.
Forking and connection handling fails; internal connection lifecycle bug, no spec rule.
Server selection spec: primary mode with empty tags array is valid; driver erroneously rejects it with a warning.
